failed_criteria.title: Definitions section defines 'You/Your' as Veridian
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the Definitions section defines 'You' and/or 'Your' to mean Veridian Health Systems, LLC, including its officers, directors, employees, agents, and representatives (or substantially similar scope). FAIL if 'You/Your' is not defined or does not encompass Veridian and its agents/employees.

failed_criteria.title: Definitions section defines 'Describe'
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the Definitions section includes a definition of 'Describe' requiring a detailed narrative or factual account. FAIL if 'Describe' is not defined in the Definitions section.

failed_criteria.title: Interrogatory re: document preservation / litigation hold
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if at least one interrogatory asks Veridian to describe its document preservation efforts, including whether and when a litigation hold was issued, the scope of the hold, and/or what steps were taken to preserve electronically stored information (ESI). FAIL if no interrogatory addresses document preservation or litigation hold implementation.
